name: yandex-mail-mcp-desktop
description: MCP server for Yandex Mail — Claude Desktop (stdio)

scripts.test: esbuild src/__tests__/sanitize.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/sanitize.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/auth.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/auth.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && esbuild src/__tests__/tools-registry.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/__tests__/tools-registry.test.js --external:node:test --external:node:assert && node --test dist/__tests__/sanitize.test.js dist/__tests__/auth.test.js dist/__tests__/tools-registry.test.js
